ddls:
CREATE TABLE "clothing_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the clothing category */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image representing the category */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the category was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing category the size belongs to */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., S, M, L, XL) */,
  "length" REAL /* Length measurement of the size */,
  "shoulder" REAL /* Shoulder measurement of the size */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length measurement of the size */,
  "bust" REAL /* Bust measurement of the size */,
  "waist" REAL /* Waist measurement for pants and other applicable categories */,
  "hip" REAL /* Hip measurement for pants and other applicable categories */,
  "inseam" REAL /* Inseam measurement for pants */,
  "chest" REAL /* Chest measurement for shirts and other applicable categories */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the size was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the size was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizes_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES clothing_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory entry */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size the inventory entry belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the size in stock */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Threshold quantity to trigger a reorder */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory was last restocked */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory entry was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory entry was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, sales manager, customer service representative) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
